---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---


::::::::::::::::::: eg-page

:::: {#hero .eg-hero .eg-hero-tint-dark .eg-hero-right .eg-hero-top style="--eg-hero-img:url('images/nrkGraze.jpg');"}
::: eg-wrap
<!--[About us]{.eg-eyebrow}-->

# Past and ongoing projects

## We deliver data-driven intelligence where it matters most.

:::
::::

:::::: {#history .eg-section .eg-history}
::::: eg-wrap
:::: eg-history-grid

::: eg-position-map
```{r}
#| label: prime-geospatial-map
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)


# 1. Define your 5 points and assign a specific color category to each
map_points <- data.frame(
  name = c("Patas", "BluGam", "LULC", "SES"),
  lat = c(-2.186424, 0.253178,-1.243098, -0.490834), 
  lng = c(34.249535, 37.966965,35.669697, 35.896665),
  # Assign a unique group or color category for each point
  category = c("A", "B", "C", "D") 
)

# 2. Define a color palette for the 5 categories
my_colors <- c("#2A5A5C", "#A97A3D", "#3D6B78", "#7A6584")
pal <- colorFactor(palette = my_colors, domain = map_points$category)

# 3. Create the map
leaflet(map_points, height = 500) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>%
  setView(lng = 37.0, lat = -1.0, zoom = 6) %>%
  
  # 4. Add markers using the palette
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~lng, 
    lat = ~lat,
    color = ~pal(category), # Dynamically apply color based on category
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    radius = 8,
    stroke = FALSE,
    label = ~name
  )

```
:::


::: eg-history-text
[Our study areas]{.eg-eyebrow}

## Three researchers, one landscape-sized problem

Prime Geospatial began as a collaborative effort among three long-time friends and doctoral researchers. Today, Prime Geospatial serves as the vital link between raw computing and actionable ground truth.

We handle the heavy lifting — accessing, processing, maintaining, and analyzing complex datasets — while uniquely providing the expert interpretation and essential validation framework that automated geospatial models lack.

We turn raw, intimidating data into clear, verified, and deeply understood spatial insights that drive smarter, faster, and more cost-effective decision-making.
:::

::::
:::::
::::::





:::::: {#case_studies .eg-section .eg-founders}
::::: eg-wrap
::: eg-sec-head
[Case studies]{.eg-eyebrow}

## Biodiversity assessment and mapping
:::

::: eg-founder-grid

::: eg-founder-card
::: eg-founder-photo
![](images/ecological-modeling.png)
:::

### Mapping Biodivesity in Narok County, Kenya


[Geospatial Data Scientist and Landscape Ecologist specializing in arid and semi-arid landscape (ASAL) management, land-use modeling, and regenerative landscape science.]{.eg-founder-expertise}

::: {.eg-hero-ctas}
[Learn more](projects_MRV.qmd#Nrk_Bio){.eg-btn .eg-btn-outline}
:::
:::



::: eg-founder-card
::: eg-founder-photo
![](images/nrkWht.jpg)
:::

### Habitat assessment for Southern Patas Monkey

[Geospatial Data Scientist and Landscape Ecologist specializing in arid and semi-arid landscape (ASAL) management, land-use modeling, and regenerative landscape science.]{.eg-founder-expertise}

::: {.eg-hero-ctas}
[Learn more](projects_MRV.qmd#patas_Hab){.eg-btn .eg-btn-outline}
:::
:::

:::
:::::
::::::





:::::: {#founders .eg-section .eg-founders}
::::: eg-wrap
::: eg-sec-head
[Case studies]{.eg-eyebrow}

## Land-Use & Land-Cover Change Modeling
:::

::: eg-founder-grid

::: eg-founder-card
::: eg-founder-photo
![](images/nrkGraze.jpg)
:::

### LULC Change modeling in Narok, Kenya

[Geospatial Data Scientist and Landscape Ecologist specializing in arid and semi-arid landscape (ASAL) management, land-use modeling, and regenerative landscape science.]{.eg-founder-expertise}

::: {.eg-hero-ctas}
[Learn more](projects_LULC.qmd#modeling_Nrk){.eg-btn .eg-btn-outline}
:::
:::


::: eg-founder-card
::: eg-founder-photo
![](images/wildB.jpg)
:::

### LULC Change Scenario modeling for planning

[Geospatial Data Scientist and Landscape Ecologist specializing in arid and semi-arid landscape (ASAL) management, land-use modeling, and regenerative landscape science.]{.eg-founder-expertise}

::: {.eg-hero-ctas}
[Learn more](projects_LULC.qmd#scenarios_Nrk){.eg-btn .eg-btn-outline}
:::
:::

:::
:::::
::::::





:::::: {#contact .eg-section .eg-contact}
::::: eg-contact-wrap
::: eg-contact-left
## Have a landscape that needs a closer look?

Tell us what you're trying to prove, protect, or plan for. Let us discuss which layers apply.
:::

::: eg-contact-box
[EMAIL]{.eg-mono-label}

[hello\@equatorgeospatial.com](mailto:hello@equatorgeospatial.com){.eg-email}

[BASED IN]{.eg-mono-label}

[Nairobi, Kenya — serving East Africa]{.eg-email-sub}

[Send us a brief](mailto:hello@equatorgeospatial.com){.eg-btn .eg-btn-solid}
:::
:::::
::::::


:::::::::::::::::::
